title: Arcanum of Wisdom
description: Welcome to Arcanum of Wisdom! Earned experience levels unlock new features and unleash exponentially improved abilities. You can earn wisdom points at the XP-Levels 5, 10, 20, 50, 80 and 100! You can lose XP but not wisdom points.
body:
# Welcome to Arcanum of Wisdom! 
Earned experience levels unlock new dimensions of knowledge and unleash exponentially improved abilities. The journey through this mod is an odyssey of wisdom, leading you to the hidden realms of the Minecraft universe.  Discover new spells, forge artifacts of incredible power, and unveil the secrets of the cosmos as you step through the gates of enlightenment. Are you ready to delve into the wisdom of the Minecraft cosmos?  (Warning: The contents of this description are exaggerated to some extent; nevertheless, have fun!)
Tip: The following XP levels increase your wisdom: 5, 10, 20, 50, 80, 100

Of course you can lose experience points, for example by dying or enchanting, but you do not lose wisdom points. This makes it easier to get started after you die and you don't lose the desire to play. On the other hand, the wisdom points are linked to the experience point system from Minecraft, so you only make progress by collecting XP.

## The idea behind AoW:
The idea behind Arcanum of Wisdom was to create a modification that would turn PvP and Manhunts on its head and make the game more fun and long-lasting without fundamentally changing any entities or structures (except in the Arcana Dimension).

## Keybinds:
> G - Settings

> X - Overview

> C, V, B, N - Abilities

## Plans for the Future:
- Maaaaany Bugfixes
- More biomes for the Arcana Dimension
- More superpowers
- More Weapons
- Some Structures and maybe even Entities for the Arcana Dimension
- Some Enchantments (Maybe in the future you can use artifacts to get enchanted books and loot)
- Mod update checker ingame (symbol that shows if the mod is outdated)
- (Maybe) a wiki page

And much more!

### Be aware that this mod is not fully developed. Errors can occur at any time. I accept no liability!

_Sorry for some spelling mistakes, I (benl4b) am originally from Germany and write most of the content without a translator..._
